title: orthochilus litoralis
intro: Orthochilus litoralis, also known as the coastal epipactis, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to the coastal regions of South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Orthochilus litoralis are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
